_comment: Illustrative output. CompetitorY has no changes and is skipped. CompetitorX has 3 changes.

change_summaries.headline: CompetitorX cut Pro plan price by 20% ($79→$63/mo) and added an AI assistant to the plan in the same week
change_summaries.implication: This is a deliberate competitive move — price cut + AI feature together positions them as cheaper AND more capable. In mid-market deals where Pro is the comparison point, we will face pricing pressure immediately. Their AI feature is beta and limited, but it will come up in demos.
change_summaries.recommended_response: Update sales team today. Add CompetitorX pricing comparison to battlecard. Prepare a rebuttal for their AI assistant claim (beta, limited). Consider whether to match the price reduction or defend value.

analysis.aggregate_assessment: CompetitorX's simultaneous price cut and feature addition is a coordinated competitive move, likely timed to their Series C announcement. This is the most significant competitive pricing event in the last 6 months. CompetitorY made no changes. Alert the sales team today — do not let this arrive via a prospect.
